subject: Checking in
body:
Hi JEE..

You OK?

It's been quite a while since we've talked..

As you know, I decided to be Dean of Social Sciences. This will not be just an "administrative" job; I've got a ton of ideas of cool things I can do with it. Plus I'm already learning some very interesting things (e.g., about the "Two Cultures"...which I think are much closer than the protagonists realize). I'll make it fun, or die trying.

I hope you are doing well.

s.
-- 
_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/_/

Stephen M. Kosslyn
830 William James Hall
Harvard University
33 Kirkland Street
Cambridge, MA 02138

voice: 1-617-495-3932
fax:   1-617-496-3122
web:   http://www.wjh.harvard.edu/~kwn/
